note: Each entry describes an intentional failure. Detection values are expectations, not legal conformance claims.

criteria.title: Non-text Content
criteria.failure: Informative image and icon button have no useful text alternative.

criteria.title: Audio-only and Video-only
criteria.failure: Audio-only content has no transcript.

criteria.title: Captions
criteria.failure: Prerecorded video has no captions.

criteria.title: Audio Description or Media Alternative
criteria.failure: Prerecorded video has no audio description or media alternative.

criteria.title: Captions Live
criteria.failure: Live video has no captions.

criteria.title: Audio Description
criteria.failure: Prerecorded video has no audio description.

criteria.title: Info and Relationships
criteria.failure: Visual table and form relationships are not programmatically exposed, and duplicate IDs can break relationships.

criteria.title: Meaningful Sequence
criteria.failure: DOM order presents steps in a confusing sequence.

criteria.title: Sensory Characteristics
criteria.failure: Instructions rely on shape and position only.

criteria.title: Orientation
criteria.failure: Task claims it only works in one orientation.

criteria.title: Identify Input Purpose
criteria.failure: Personal information fields omit autocomplete purpose tokens.

criteria.title: Use of Color
criteria.failure: Required fields are communicated by color alone.

criteria.title: Audio Control
criteria.failure: Audio starts automatically without a visible pause or stop control.

criteria.title: Contrast Minimum
criteria.failure: Text contrast is below minimum.

criteria.title: Resize Text
criteria.failure: Tiny fixed text is likely unusable when resized.

criteria.title: Images of Text
criteria.failure: Important text is rendered as an image-like graphic.

criteria.title: Reflow
criteria.failure: Fixed-width content causes horizontal scrolling on narrow screens.

criteria.title: Non-text Contrast
criteria.failure: Button boundary and state contrast are too low.

criteria.title: Text Spacing
criteria.failure: Content overlaps when text spacing is increased.

criteria.title: Content on Hover or Focus
criteria.failure: Hover content cannot be dismissed or hovered independently.

criteria.title: Keyboard
criteria.failure: Clickable div is not keyboard operable.

criteria.title: No Keyboard Trap
criteria.failure: Tab key is trapped inside the section.

criteria.title: Character Key Shortcuts
criteria.failure: Single-key shortcut cannot be disabled or remapped.

criteria.title: Timing Adjustable
criteria.failure: Session expires without a way to extend time.

criteria.title: Pause Stop Hide
criteria.failure: Moving content starts automatically without a clear pause control.

criteria.title: Three Flashes or Below Threshold
criteria.failure: Content flashes rapidly.

criteria.title: Bypass Blocks
criteria.failure: Skip link remains hidden when focused.

criteria.title: Page Titled
criteria.failure: Page title is vague.

criteria.title: Focus Order
criteria.failure: Focus starts in the middle of the visual sequence.

criteria.title: Link Purpose In Context
criteria.failure: Link text is ambiguous.

criteria.title: Multiple Ways
criteria.failure: Support content has only one navigation path.

criteria.title: Headings and Labels
criteria.failure: Label text does not describe the input purpose.

criteria.title: Focus Visible
criteria.failure: Focus outline is removed.

criteria.title: Focus Not Obscured Minimum
criteria.failure: Overlay covers the focused control.

criteria.title: Pointer Gestures
criteria.failure: Path-based gesture has no single-pointer alternative.

criteria.title: Pointer Cancellation
criteria.failure: Action fires on pointer down with no cancellation.

criteria.title: Label in Name
criteria.failure: Accessible name does not include the visible label.

criteria.title: Motion Actuation
criteria.failure: Device motion is required without a conventional alternative.

criteria.title: Dragging Movements
criteria.failure: Dragging is required without a non-drag alternative.

criteria.title: Target Size Minimum
criteria.failure: Interactive target is smaller than 24 by 24 CSS pixels.

criteria.title: Language of Page
criteria.failure: The page omits a lang attribute.

criteria.title: Language of Parts
criteria.failure: French phrase is not marked with lang.

criteria.title: On Focus
criteria.failure: Focusing the input changes context.

criteria.title: On Input
criteria.failure: Changing a select value changes context without warning.

criteria.title: Consistent Navigation
criteria.failure: Repeated navigation appears in a different order.

criteria.title: Consistent Identification
criteria.failure: Buttons for the same action use different labels.

criteria.title: Consistent Help
criteria.failure: Help placement is inconsistent.

criteria.title: Error Identification
criteria.failure: Error message does not identify the field or problem.

criteria.title: Labels or Instructions
criteria.failure: Inputs rely on placeholders instead of labels.

criteria.title: Error Suggestion
criteria.failure: Invalid value has no suggestion for correction.

criteria.title: Error Prevention Legal Financial Data
criteria.failure: Financial transfer has no review, reversal, or confirmation step.

criteria.title: Redundant Entry
criteria.failure: Previously entered information must be typed again.

criteria.title: Accessible Authentication Minimum
criteria.failure: Login requires a cognitive function test with no accessible alternative.

criteria.title: Name Role Value
criteria.failure: Custom checkbox lacks complete native keyboard semantics, and hidden focusable content can confuse assistive technology.

criteria.title: Status Messages
criteria.failure: Status text changes without a live region role or aria-live.
